---
name: Knowledge Contribution
about: Submit a new rebuild procedure, survival technique, or knowledge module
title: "[KNOWLEDGE] "
labels: knowledge
assignees: ""
---

## Module Title
Name of the procedure or knowledge module.

## Category
- [ ] Survival (Day 0-30)
- [ ] Stabilization (Month 1-6)
- [ ] Industrial Rebuilding (Year 1+)
- [ ] Medical
- [ ] Agriculture
- [ ] Energy
- [ ] Communications
- [ ] Manufacturing
- [ ] Computing
- [ ] Other: ___

## Summary
1-2 sentence overview of what this covers.

## Prerequisites
What other modules or knowledge should the reader have first?

## Materials / Resources Needed
List what's required (with alternatives for scarcity).

## Procedure
Step-by-step instructions. Be specific and unambiguous.

## Safety Warnings
Any dangers, especially related to radiation, chemicals, electricity, or structural risks.

## Sources
Where does this knowledge come from? Books, training, personal experience?

## Tested?
- [ ] I have personally done this
- [ ] I have seen this done
- [ ] This is from a verified published source
- [ ] This is theoretical / from research

## Nuclear Context Notes
Any adaptations needed for a post-nuclear environment (contamination, limited materials, radiation concerns)?
